item.title: FLASHBACK: Sen. John Cornyn Claimed ‘Irrelevant’ Trump Couldn’t Win The 2024 Presidential Election
item.description: Trump is reportedly mulling an endorsement for Cornyn, so it's time for a reminder of several instance in which Cornyn betrayed conservatives.

item.title: Senate Debate On Iran War Turns Into Senile Men Shouting At Sky
item.description: If the United States Senate can figure out who's responsible for all these unfortunate wars over the last couple of decades, somebody's really gonna h...

item.title: North Carolina’s Two-Vote Race Is Exactly Why The SAVE Act Is So Necessary
item.description: When elections are decided on razor thin margins like this, every single vote matters

item.title: ‘Make The Right Choices’: Fallen Soldier’s Advice Should Guide Trump’s War In Iran
item.description: How many more families will have to hear the death knell of the doorbell? At the very least, they should know what it is we’re fighting for.

item.title: Another Study Shows How Covid Learning Losses Are Still Hurting Students
item.description: More than 2 in 3 schools (68 percent) are performing worse in both math and reading than they did before the Covid panic.
